description_long: This is a large, modern office desk with a dark matte finish, featuring a spacious rectangular work surface with a subtle cutout on one side for ergonomic access. On the left side, there are three horizontal drawers with metallic handles, providing ample storage for office supplies or documents. The right side has a solid panel concealing additional storage or leg space, while the central area beneath the desktop is open for comfortable seating. The back of the desk is mostly flat, with a recessed section and three square panels, likely for cable management or ventilation. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a professional appearance suitable for executive or administrative environments. The desk's design emphasizes both functionality and aesthetics, making it ideal for urban office settings.
description: A large, dark-finished office desk with three drawers on the left, a solid right panel, and a spacious work surface. Its modern, sturdy design is ideal for professional environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing three metallic-handled drawers on the left, an open central leg space, and a solid right panel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid side panel and the depth of the desk, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a mostly flat back with a recessed section and three square panels on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a solid panel and a black rectangular inset, with no drawers visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features three drawers on the left and an open leg space in the center, with the solid panel on the right; this side is intended to face the user.
